chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Ruling Regarding an Impotent Husband

text: 4898 - وَ رُوِيَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: "أَنَّهُ مَتَى أَقَامَتِ اَلْمَرْأَةُ مَعَ زَوْجِهَا بَعْدَ مَا عَلِمَتْ أَنَّهُ عِنِّينٌ وَ رَضِيَتْ بِهِ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهَا خِيَارٌ بَعْدَ اَلرِّضَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4898 - It is narrated in another report: "Whenever a woman continues to live with her husband after knowing that he is impotent and she accepts him in that condition, she no longer has the option to separate from him after her acceptance."
